pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly injects a CouchDB document with 'firstName': 'Dolores'
setup_task.sh explicitly injects a CouchDB document with 'lastName': 'Welch'
setup_task.sh sets PATIENT_ID='patient_p1_dolores' for the CouchDB PUT request
setup_task.sh creates this specific file via ImageMagick 'convert'
task.json description explicitly instructs the agent to enter this exact description string
verifier.py checks for these exact keywords in the lowercased description

privileged_info_summary: The patient data for 'Dolores Welch' and the photo image are synthetically generated by setup scripts. The patient's CouchDB ID is exactly 'patient_p1_dolores', and the generated photo is stored at '/home/ga/Documents/patient_photo.jpg'. The task verifier strictly requires the photo description to contain the keywords 'identification', 'photo', 'front', and 'view', all of which are present in the expected description 'Patient Identification Photo - Front View'.
